paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.45, with a change of 5.31% from the prior close and a change of -28.15% over the last 21 sessions. The price is as of July 21, 2026. There has been one new news item in the last 24 hours.

Recent news includes an announcement from Fermi Inc. regarding its second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, which is scheduled for August 13, 2026. This news was reported by TradingView on July 21, 2026.

There have been various SEC filings from Fermi Inc., including a recent SCHEDULE 13G filing on July 20, 2026, and 8-K filings on July 15, July 13, and July 9, 2026. The 8-K filings reported on the issuance of convertible senior notes, the resignation of a director, and the commencement of an offering for the sale of convertible senior notes. There has been one Form 4 filing in the feed.
